common.reassure: We never ask for your password.

masuk.title: Sign in
masuk.subtitle: We never ask for your password. — just your phone number.
masuk.otpLabel: Enter the code sent by SMS to {phone}
masuk.bypassEyebrow: Dev test — quick sign in with a number
masuk.devEyebrow: Dev test — sign in with email
masuk.sendFailed: Failed to send the code. Please try again.

beranda.coldStart: No assets recorded yet. Start with one — it takes just a few seconds.
beranda.headline: Everything is recorded.
beranda.mapLede: This is the map your family will receive — what you hold, and how to claim each one.
beranda.sealedSub: Released only when the time comes, to the people you choose.

assets.archiveConfirmBody: This asset will leave the recovery map your family receives. You can add it again later, but its notes and instructions won't come back.

form.sectionBeneficiary: Beneficiary on file with the provider
form.label: Name / label
form.beneficiaryQ: Has the provider already recorded a beneficiary?
form.beneficiaryHelp: E.g. a beneficiary on file at the insurer/BPJS/bank who can claim directly from the provider. This is not your Warisly recipient list (set that in Amanah).

drafts.lowConfidence: Not sure about: {fields}. Please check before saving.

scan.title: Scan an asset
scan.intro: Photograph an app screen or a document — we help fill it in. You always review before it's saved.
scan.takePhotoHint: An app screen (e.g. Ajaib) or a document (e.g. a certificate).
scan.captureReassure: We never ask for your password. For balance screenshots we only read the number, then we don't keep the image.
scan.whatWeRead: What we read from the image
scan.screenshotNote: the image isn't stored, only the data
scan.documentNote: this document photo will be saved for your family
scan.noAccessReassure: We never ask for your password, and we can never access this account.
scan.errorExtract: Couldn't read the image. Try again or fill in manually.

ktp.ownerIntro: Photograph your KTP to fill in your NIK automatically. You review before it's saved. Official verification is done separately.
ktp.heirIntro: Photograph your KTP to fill in your NIK. No account needed. You review before sending; official verification is done separately by our team.
ktp.takePhotoHint: Place the KTP within the frame and avoid glare.
ktp.captureReassure: We only read the NIK, name, and date of birth — then we don't keep your ID photo.
ktp.reviewNote: Check what we read. The ID photo isn't stored. This data is not yet verified.
ktp.errorRead: Couldn't read the ID card. Try again or fill in manually.

amanah.title: Trustees, Recipients & Wishes
amanah.quorumNeed: Need {required} of {of} trustees to begin the process.
amanah.faraidNote: Inheritance law (faraid/civil) determines who is entitled to inherit and their share. This list determines who receives the information — it is not a legal decision.
amanah.wasiatNote: A wasiat for non-heirs is capped at one-third of the estate. This is an informational reminder, not legal advice.

wali.title: Who acts
wali.summary: {confirmed}/{required} confirmed. A {required}-of-{of} quorum is required to begin the process. Add backups so the plan keeps working.
wali.inviteHelp: Share this invite link with the trustee:

waliConfirm.title: Trustee invitation
waliConfirm.greeting: Hello {name}, you have been asked to be a trustee — a trusted person who manages the digital estate if the owner is unable to.

profil.title: Identity & security
profil.kycHelp: Verification is required so the estate can be released to the family safely. Warisly does not store your biometric data — verification is processed by a Dukcapil-licensed provider.
profil.ktpPrefill: Scan your KTP to pre-fill NIK

rilis.verifyFirstBody: The release rule can be set after your identity is verified.
rilis.title: Waiting period & confirmation
rilis.intro: Before anything is released, Warisly waits for the waiting period and sends a confirmation via the channels you choose. This prevents release by mistake.
rilis.quorumNote: Trustee quorum: {required} of {of} trustees are needed to start the release process. Set trustees in Amanah.

dosier.title: Recovery Guide
dosier.intro: A list of assets and the steps for the family to claim each one. Values are estimates.
dosier.noPlaybook: No specific guide yet. Contact the provider with the heir documents above.

klaim.title: Starting the inheritance process
klaim.intro: For the family left behind. Enter the registered phone number of the person who has passed to begin. No account needed.
klaim.notFound: We couldn't find any data for this number. Contact support if you believe it's registered.
klaim.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please start again.
klaim.docsIntro: Upload the death certificate and family card (KK) of the person who has passed. Our team will review them and guide the next steps.
klaim.sentBody: Thank you. If this number is registered with Warisly, our team will review the documents and the family will be contacted through the registered channels.
klaim.docsRequired: Upload the death certificate and family card (KK).
klaim.docsReceived: Documents received. The next step is verifying your identity.
klaim.underReview: Thank you. Your request is under review by our team, and the family will be contacted via the registered channels. Please wait.
klaim.waiting: The request is approved and in the safety waiting period. Once it ends, the guide will be available on this page.
klaim.rejected: This request cannot proceed. Please contact Warisly support.
